issues.title: every sse  url  cannot  be connected successfully   ！！help！！
issues.body:
**application.properties:**

spring.ai.mcp.client.sse.connections.server1.url= "https://mcp-d8512d23-412f-46b1.api-inference.modelscope.cn


**code like this： **

client: 

private final ToolCallbackProvider tools;
private final ChatClient.Builder chatClientBuilder;

chatClientBuilder
                    .defaultTools(tools)
                    .defaultAdvisors(
                            new PromptChatMemoryAdvisor(chatMemory),
                            new LoggingAdvisor()
                    )
                    .build();

private Flux<String> processUserInput(String input) {
		return chatClient.prompt()
				.system(s -> s.param("current_date", LocalDate.now().toString()))
				.user(input)
				.advisors(a -> a.param(CHAT_MEMORY_CONVERSATION_ID_KEY, sessionId)
						.param(CHAT_MEMORY_RETRIEVE_SIZE_KEY, 100))
				.stream()
				.chatResponse()
				.flatMap(response -> sinkHandler.handleTextResponse(response));
	}

when  i start the demo ，it look very nice，but few seconds later， it always failed with  ERROR  “Received unrecognized SSE event type: null”    

next details error ：

comments.body: I was using the snapshot version, and it seems a new minor version was released today. After I changed back to M7, the problem disappeared.
At the same time, as you said, I changed `org.springframework.ai:spring-ai-ollama-spring-boot-starter` to `org.springframework.ai:spring-ai-starter-model-ollama`. Thanks for your reply. @ThomasVitale

我也报这个错，你是怎么修改的呢？

Seems to be the same problem. `org.springframework.ai:spring-ai-openai-spring-boot-starter` should be changed to `org.springframework.ai:spring-ai-starter-model-openai`. You can refer to the Upgrade Notes for more information: https://docs.spring.io/spring-ai/reference/upgrade-notes.html#common-sections

> 似乎是同样的问题。 应更改为 。有关更多信息，请参阅升级说明：https://docs.spring.io/spring-ai/reference/upgrade-notes.html#common-sections`org.springframework.ai:spring-ai-openai-spring-boot-starter``org.springframework.ai:spring-ai-starter-model-openai`

Thanks a lot, solved

issues.title: FunctionCallingOptions was not completely removed
issues.body:
Please do a quick search in GitHub issues first, you may already have a duplicate of the one you are about to create.
If the error is not serious, please create an issue directly. Otherwise, please take a few minutes to fill out the following sections:

**Bug Description**
Due to the changes in PR #2922, the FunctionCallingOptions implemented by MoonshotChatOptions has been removed!

![Image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/74fe2e82-094d-416b-96b3-b6e1efa990bf)

**Environment**
Please provide as many details as possible: Spring AI version, Java version, vector storage you use (if any), etc.

**Steps to reproduce**
Steps to reproduce the problem.

**Expected Behavior**
Describe clearly and concisely what you expect to happen.

**Minimum Complete Reproducible Example**
Please provide a failing test or a minimal complete verifiable example that reproduces the issue.

Reproducible bug reports will be resolved before non-reproducible ones.

comments.body: Thanks for raising this issue! The Moonshot integration was moved to the Spring AI Community organization, so this issue should probably be transferred there: https://github.com/spring-ai-community/moonshot
Thank you for your timely response and reminder
